title: spergularia campestris var. alpina
intro: Spergularia campestris var. alpina, also known as Alpine Sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant have not been extensively scientifically studied.
